items.title: How to Assign a Survey in SmartWinnr
items.description: After creating a survey with questions, assign it to the intended participants so they can take the survey and submit their responses.

items.title: How to create a 'Survey Template'.
items.description: Survey templates allow you to design reusable survey frameworks that can be used to create consistent surveys multiple times.

items.title: How to create a 'Survey'.
items.description: Surveys in SmartWinnr allow you to collect structured feedback from participants quickly and effectively.

items.title: How to delete a Survey
items.description: Follow the below steps to delete a survey through SmartWinnr.

items.title: How to duplicate a 'Survey' and 'Survey Template'.
items.description: SmartWinnr allows you to duplicate an existing survey so that you can reuse the structure, questions, logic, and settings without having to recreate everything…

items.title: Survey
items.description: Collect structured feedback with templates, sections, and response analytics.

items.title: Survey Analytics
items.description: Survey Analytics allows you to monitor and analyze responses collected from your surveys.

items.title: Survey Template Analytics
items.description: Follow the below steps to view analytics in Survey Template.

items.title: What are the different question types in a Survey /Survey Template?
items.description: There are 8 Question Types available in a survey template.

items.title: What is the difference between a Survey and a Survey Template?
items.description: In SmartWinnr, Surveys and Survey Templates serve different purposes based on how often and in what context they are used.
